title: Non-record: Cosine TTT 30ep on SwiGLU + U-Net (1xH100, val_bpb=1.1175)
body:
## Summary

Non-record 1xH100 submission extending PR #462's SwiGLU + U-Net architecture with **30-epoch cosine TTT** (vs default 10 epochs).

**val_bpb = 1.1175** (sliding window stride=64) | **7.5 MB** artifact | 1xH100 SXM

## Key Finding

Increasing TTT epochs from 10 to 30 (with cosine lr decay already enabled) improves val_bpb from 1.2531 to 1.1175 on 1xH100 (-10.8%). This is consistent with PR #481's cosine TTT findings and PR #486's confirmation of 30-epoch TTT improving their stack from 1.1132 to 1.0887 on 8xH100.

## Results (1xH100 SXM, seed 1337)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Training steps | 936 (wallclock capped) |
| Pre-quant val_bpb | 1.3646 |
| Post-quant roundtrip val_bpb | 1.0684 |
| **Sliding window val_bpb** | **1.1175** |
| Artifact size | 7.5 MB |

## What We Tried (Negative Results)

| Experiment | Result |
|-----------|--------|
| Depth recurrence (Huginn-style) | Not competitive — compute overhead > param savings |
| MLP-only TTT (TTT-E2E paper) | -0.062 BPB worse without meta-learning |
| Earlier QAT onset | Slightly worse |
| Mixed int5/int6 post-training | Catastrophic without training-time adaptation |

## Architecture

PR #462's full stack: 11L SwiGLU (hidden=1792), U-Net gated skips, BigramHash (8192), SmearGate, EMA (0.9985), Late QAT, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, Int6+zstd. Only change: `TTT_EPOCHS=30`.

## Limitation

Needs 8xH100 verification. 30 TTT epochs at seq_len=2048 is estimated at ~7 min on 8xH100, within the 10-min eval budget.

## Credits

PR #462 (JoeProAI), PR #481 (mrdavtan), PR #442 (sjp611), PR #398 (felipe-parodi)

## Test plan

- [x] train_gpt.py compiles and runs
- [x] Artifact under 16 MB (7.5 MB)
- [x] PR only adds files to one new folder
- [ ] Pending: 8xH100 verification
